title: Youmind 22081 Youmind 22081
prompt: A high-angle, top-down photograph of an artist's wooden workspace. In the center sits an elegant, open dark wood display box with two side-by-side portrait panels. The left panel shows a crisp, {argument name="photo style" default="black-and-white silver-gelatin photograph"} of a young woman looking off to the side in profile, wearing a black knit sweater, a delicate necklace, and a {argument name="accent color" default="vibrant, textured gold hoop earring"} with a droplet charm that provides the only color in the image. The right panel features a meticulous, multi-layered paper-cut art interpretation of the exact same portrait, crafted from layered shades of grey cardstock to create depth, complete with the same textured gold earring. Small metallic plaques are mounted beneath each image, reading "ORIGINAL: SILVER-GELATIN PHOTOGRAPH" and "INTERPRETATION: SHADOW BOX PAPER ART" respectively, with the central title "{argument name="title text" default="THE DIALECTIC OF PORTRAITURE"}" engraved in the wood. Scattered around the box on the weathered wooden table are artist tools, including a precision craft knife, a pencil, ink bottles, and a closed sketchbook, creating an authentic studio atmosphere.
